text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Mile Championship. While
seeing off Nishino Flower as usual...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey-hey! Heliboss in the house! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios crashes in with a loud entrance.
She debuted before Nishino Flower and is one of
the racers most favored to win today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hello, Helios. Let's have a good race today!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Vibe check! Yup, I'm feelin' goated! Time to fly
outta the gates and pop off!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, me and the girls are off to the paddock!
C'mon, BB Flo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wha—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! You know how it goes, gang! Let's
gooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Let's hype it up, fam! It's time to get glam!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Let's hype it up, fam. It's time to get glam.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Hype it up, fam. Time to get glam.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Which one of you partyers is ready to get
smooched by the goddess of victory? 'Cause I
know I am!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't tell me you're waiting on me! And who
said I wanted to party?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Girl?! You mean you're not down bad for the goddess?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh! Everyone knows partyers pop off on
miles! It's about to be a pop-off party!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, really?! Then, u-um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's... party!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Woo! ...Did I say that right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh geez, you're so pure it's adorable. It's like I'm
in the presence of an angel.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
BB Flo, you slay, girl! ☆ And now that Nature's in
a party mood too, let's get lit!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Let's hear it, party girls! ! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: L-let's get lit!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. This is fun.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Whatever race she runs in, Helios always brings
with her a warm, sunny breeze.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Your performance at the Sprinters Stakes is still
fresh in my memory. I'm excited to see how you'll
sail through the air here too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Let's get li—oh, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Yes. Let's get lit.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ooh... Um, I'm looking forward to running with
you!
